baseline_summary: Replace this with the real baseline summary. / 用真实基线摘要替换这里。
template_rules: Report only the checks that were actually required by this MB. / 只报告该 MB 实际要求的检查项。
Do not use this report for vague summaries without check-level evidence. / 不要把这份报告写成没有检查级证据的空泛总结。
Every required check must have a final status. / 每个必需检查都必须有最终状态。
When relevant, show how the MB stayed aligned with the parent FB ontology frame and impact map. / 在相关情况下，说明该 MB 如何保持与父 FB 的本体框架和影响地图一致。
When relevant, show whether the approved external UI package or design authority was consumed without unapproved visual drift. / 在相关情况下，说明批准的外部 UI 包或设计权威是否被正确消费，且没有未经批准的视觉漂移。
When relevant, explain whether the MB stayed within its declared inheritance slice. / 在相关情况下，说明该 MB 是否保持在自己声明的继承切片内。
Allowed statuses are: pass, fail, waived, not_applicable. / 允许的状态只有：pass、fail、waived、not_applicable。
